## Checklist

- [ ] Issue referenced with `Closes #NNN`
- [ ] Milestone assigned to this PR
- [ ] PR title follows conventional commits: `type(scope): description`
- [ ] Tests pass: `task test` or `task test:SERVICE`
- [ ] Linter passes: `task lint:force`
- [ ] Service CLAUDE.md updated (if behavior changed)
- [ ] Spec updated in `docs/specs/` (if architecture changed)
